titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَكُونُ لَهَا الْعَبْدُ فَيَنْكِحُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 134 – The woman happens to have the slave for her, so he sleeps with her

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَكُونُ لَهَا الْعَبْدُ فَيَنْكِحُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 134 – The woman happens to have the slave for her, so he sleeps with her

segments: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي امْرَأَةٍ أَمْكَنَتْ نَفْسَهَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ لَهَا فَنَكَحَهَا أَنْ تُضْرَبَ مِائَةً وَ يُضْرَبَ الْعَبْدُ خَمْسِينَ جَلْدَةً وَ يُبَاعَ بِصُغْرٍ مِنْهَا قَالَ وَ يَحْرُمُ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ أَنْ يَبِيعَهَا عَبْداً مُدْرِكاً بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ .
arabic.text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) فِي امْرَأَةٍ أَمْكَنَتْ نَفْسَهَا مِنْ عَبْدٍ لَهَا فَنَكَحَهَا أَنْ تُضْرَبَ مِائَةً وَ يُضْرَبَ الْعَبْدُ خَمْسِينَ جَلْدَةً وَ يُبَاعَ بِصُغْرٍ مِنْهَا قَالَ وَ يَحْرُمُ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ أَنْ يَبِيعَهَا عَبْداً مُدْرِكاً بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah Bin Hilal, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a woman who let herself be enabled upon from a slave of hers, so he slept with her, that she would be whipped one hundred lashes and the slave would be whipped fifty lashes, and he would be sold (for a price) cheaper than her’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And he<sup>asws</sup> prohibited upon every Muslim that he sells to her an adult slave, after that’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Abdullah Bin Hilal, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> judged regarding a woman who let herself be enabled upon from a slave of hers, so he slept with her, that she would be whipped one hundred lashes and the slave would be whipped fifty lashes, and he would be sold (for a price) cheaper than her’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And he<sup>asws</sup> prohibited upon every Muslim that he sells to her an adult slave, after that’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ بْنِ رَزِينٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

parts.text: مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ

titles.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ يَكُونُ لَهَا الْعَبْدُ فَيَنْكِحُهَا
titles.en: Chapter 134 – The woman happens to have the slave for her, so he sleeps with her

segments: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ الْحُرَّةِ تَكُونُ تَحْتَ الْمَمْلُوكِ فَتَشْتَرِيهِ هَلْ يُبْطِلُ ذَلِكَ نِكَاحَهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ لِأَنَّهُ عَبْدٌ مَمْلُوكٌ لَا يَقْدِرُ عَلَى شَيْ‏ءٍ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَرْأَةِ الْحُرَّةِ تَكُونُ تَحْتَ الْمَمْلُوكِ فَتَشْتَرِيهِ هَلْ يُبْطِلُ ذَلِكَ نِكَاحَهُ قَالَ نَعَمْ لِأَنَّهُ عَبْدٌ مَمْلُوكٌ لَا يَقْدِرُ عَلَى شَيْ‏ءٍ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Ja’far Abu Al Abbas, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan, from Saeed Bin Yasaar who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the free woman who happens to be under the slave (as his wife), would that invalidate his marriage?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, because an owned slave has no power over anything’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Ja’far Abu Al Abbas, from Ayoub Bin Nuh, from Safwan, from Saeed Bin Yasaar who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the free woman who happens to be under the slave (as his wife), would that invalidate his marriage?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, because an owned slave has no power over anything’.

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ أَبُو الْعَبَّاسِ عَنْ أَيُّوبَ بْنِ نُوحٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ قَالَ
